How to Create
Irresistible Sales
Messages for ANY
Business
Module 5: How to Create Your First
DAMN GOOD AD…
...in just 9 minutes
With Dan Kennedy and John Carlton
www.gkic.com
www.getwsodownload.com

inquiries from the Presentation.

confidential all information contained herein not
already in the public domain and will use this

yourself with certain limited background information
concerning GKIC and its business strategy, plans and
activities. If you have signed a confidentiality

-- 3 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 4
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
How to Create Your First Damn Good Ad in Just 9 Minutes
John Carlton: Now you’re going to learn how to write a damn good in nine
minutes.
I want to reinforce the notion that I'm not going to teach you how to write.
Writing is a word that packs a whole lot of
emotional baggage that doesn't need to be there.
So if you don't want to write, you don't consider yourself a writer or you're
fearful of writing then think of it not as writing something but as creating a sales
message.
You never have to put pencil to paper; you never have to sit down with a
keyboard, you never have to do any of this stuff.
There’s a quick three-step way to write an ad really fast when you're in trouble.
If you know how to sell something to somebody:
 You sit down and record it
 Then you transcribe it and have somebody type it out
 Then you clean it up
That's not a bad ad. I'm going to teach you how to
do a better version here. But that way your hands
never touch a keyboard. So this is not about
writing.
Step #1: Hit the Bar, Look for Trouble
Step one of this process – How to write a damn good ad in nine minutes – is hit
the bar, look for trouble.
The elevator pitch
makes it vivid in
your head.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 5
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
The reason I talked about the elevator pitch is because it made it vivid in your
head. How many people had a breakthrough when they had finally understood
the elevator pitch idea? Okay good chunk of the room.
You don't need to hit a bar. It can be a coffee shop. It can be any place where
people gather but here is the image I want you to have in your mind.
You are sitting there minding your own business. Somebody walks up, sits down
next to you and says – not to you but to the
bartender – "Joe, give me a double. I just
had an awful day."
The bartender says, "Gee Ed why'd you
have such a bad day?" as he's pouring him
a double shot.
Ed, the guy who sat down next to you, says what his problem was.
And, interestingly enough, what you offer – your product, your service – is
exactly what fixes the problem that Ed has.
So what do you say to Ed?
Step #2: What Would You Say?
I want you to have this image in mind, because a good ad is what? It's a
conversation with somebody.
The only difference between a good face-to-face salesman and an ad in print – or
a video ad online or any kind of sales message – is that it's some form of a
conversation.
Where big corporations go wrong, where entrepreneurs go
wrong, with their advertising is they get away from
that idea of it being a conversation.
It's human-to-human interaction. I like to call it, “Just you and me talking.”
Step #1
Hit the bar.
Look for trouble.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 6
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
Have you ever seen two people in a corner of a room – there's a lot of movement
going on, they're sitting facing each other and they're kind of slumped forward
and they're talking urgently?
That is the conversation you've having with your prospects.
The good thing about written ads is that you can multiply that by an infinite
number of times.
So rather than have a face-to-face with every single possible prospect you might
have, you can multiply that by making it a written ad or a video or something
like that.
So step two, what would you say to your
perfect prospect, let's call him Ed, who
doesn't yet know how awesome you are?
Think about that for just a second.
There's one hint here. The hint is he
doesn't like you yet.
The number one mistake rookie marketers make is they think that, because you
have a product that fixes his problem, he is immediately putty in your hands.
You think there's nothing more he would like to do than to sit there and listen to
you babble endlessly about what you do and why it's so great.
You take an hour to get to the point because you don't
know how to do an elevator chat.
Okay, what would you say? You should have this in your mind. Would you say “I
have an elaborate scheme that takes about an hour to explain and I have a
$10,000 program that if you buy you probably would understand it at the end of
that program?”
Is that what you say? What would be the first words out of your mouth?
Step #2
What would you SAY to your
perfect prospect who
doesn’t yet know how
awesome you are?
(Hint: He doesn’t like you yet.)
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 6 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 7
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
“Excuse me, I couldn't help overhearing.”
Now that probably won't make it into your ad but you understand that is just
code for social lubrication.
You’ve got to keep that in mind. He doesn't like you. He's not ready to hear from
you.
What would you do if you were sitting somewhere and a stranger turned to you
and started jabbering at you?
What's your first instinct? Get the hell out of there.
It’s the same with written ads and stuff.
That's why the most important part of your ad is going to be your headline, your
super script with the little part above the headline. The first things they see.
You have split seconds to get his attention and to get
him into the story.
You don't have an infinite amount of time.
Step #3: That’s Your Headline
So what you would say to him, that's step
three, that's your headline.
Let's say Bob is having a bad day because
he's got a website that isn't pulling.
It used to pull, it used to do really well
with organic search and now the
competition is eating him alive and he's
not making any money.
Step #3
That’s your HEADLINE.
(Hint: Short, Sizzling, Specific.)
(“How to…”)
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 7 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 8
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
You might turn to him and say, "Excuse me, I couldn't help overhearing. I had
the same problem quite a while ago and I learned to solve it. Now I’ve got four
times the number of hits.”
You start talking the language that he's talking;
you join the conversation in his head.
If he says, "I'm not turning hits into sales," for example – if that's how he
describes his problem – and you say, "I solved that about a year ago and I've
been helping about 180,000 people do that through my coaching program. Right
now I'm quadrupling sales," then you turn that around to a how-to headline and
it's:
“How To Quadruple Your Sales Online
Even If Competition Is Eating You Alive.”
The key here – this is one of the things you want to write down – Short, Sizzling
and Specific.
If you have trouble writing headlines, go to the standard fallback headline that
starts with “How To.”
What follows “How To” is basically how you are talking to that guy.
Step #4: Introduce Yourself
Step four – introduce yourself and establish your credibility.
How many people have had to do this face-to-face with a stranger who may be a
cold to lukewarm prospect but you've had to establish your credibility in a very,
very short period of time?
It's not easy; for most people it's very,
very hard because what do most people
do wrong when they're trying to establish
credibility?
Step #4
INTRODUCE yourself...
And establish your CREDIBILITY.
(BOND, don’t brag.)
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 8 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 9
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
They brag.
What you want to do is bond.
A lot of what Dan was talking about involves bonding.
The origin myth – my origin myth was great. It's absolutely true, I was sleeping
on a friend's couch, living out of my car.
I had this epiphany that nothing was going to change unless I was going to be
the engine of change.
That took me from slackerdom to starting my long process of discovering how
to make things happen.
So how is this imaginary conversation going so far in your head with this guy in
the bar? Are you starting to progress a little bit?
Step #5: Have a Happy Client Drop By
Step five in this thing is imagine that a happy client of yours stops by and says,
"Doug, how are you doing? Man I can't believe I saw you here.
That advice you gave me last week, my God it worked like crazy. I have quadrupled
my sales online since I did what you told me to do…
Sorry to interrupt. Doug's the greatest guy
in the world. I don't know who you are but
listen to Doug,”
Then he pats you on the back and walks
away.
The best thing that could happen to you in that face-to-face conversation would
be somebody coming by and doing that in person.
When you’ve got an advertisement or something, you have to make that happen.
That's all testimonials are, third party endorsement.
Step #5
Have a HAPPY CLIENT drop by.
(Testimonial.)
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 9 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 10
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
When you say it, it's bragging. When somebody
else says it, it's credibility.
Step #6: Shameless Teasing with Benefits
Now we start getting to the meat. And this involves shameless teasing with
benefits.
Anybody weak on the ideas of features vs. benefits? If you've been in Dan's
world for more than 10 minutes, you should know all of this.
 A feature is the heft, weight, the clunk value, whatever you have; the
numbers, the physical nature of the product, the things that you do in
your service.
 The benefits are what it does for you.
I'm going to read a finished conversation for you in a bit but I want you to suffer
a bit thinking about it in your own stew here.
Does anybody have a problem with shamelessly teasing a prospect with
benefits?
Do you understand why I use the term shameless teasing?
When you explain too much in an ad, you
start to bore them.
If you make it happen in their head, you are
creating action. You are starting to spur
them on.
If you solve everything, there's nothing left for them to do.
There are two kinds of bullets and this refers to, I would call this the bulletizing
part. Does everybody know what a bullet is or a fascination?
Step #6
Shameless teasing with BENEFITS.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 10 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 11
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
A bullet is a dot and you have a little line of copy that connects usually a feature
with a benefit, something like that.
There are two kinds of bullets that professional copywriters use.
 The explanatory bullet which says, “I have what I call the Duckworth
Method that will help you actually do the three things necessary to get a
client to do X” and then you list those three things. For example if he's
over 50 years old it will show him how to X. Very specific, tells it.
 The other kind of bullet is called the blind bullet.
When professional writers write, actually it's in the contract of Rodale and
Boardroom, I think, of how many blind bullets versus explanatory bullets you
can put in.
It's about a 10 to one – about 10 blind bullets to
one explanatory bullet.
You do the explanatory bullet as part of your
credibility. You actually know how to do this.
What I'm doing here in these sessions, I'm actually showing you how to do
something. That's an explanatory.
I could've come up and just teased about it. “I know how to make you all rich. If
you follow me, I will make you wealthy, happy and wise” and not tell you how
I'm going to do that.
The teasing stuff is where the talent comes in. It's where in the conversation you
might say something like,
"I learned how to quadruple my profits online and I did it in an hour and a half
and it was really great. I just stumbled on this idea; it worked really easy and I
taught my 10 year old daughter how to do it and I taught this guy who actually
has a learning disability how to it and it was great.
The teasing is where
the talents comes in.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 11 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 12
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
It worked really fast. These guys are now not just quadrupling their profits but
even 10 times and 20 times. But I don't want to bore you with the details. It works
really easy."
Audience Examples
We're zooming through this. Does anybody want to try giving me what they
think is a shameless teasing bullet?
Give me a sizzling example of what you do to help people fix the problems in
their lives based on results.
Audience: How about a surefire way of winning the lottery with a one
dollar ticket?
John: You have a product that will win the lottery?
No, I'm just teasing.
Okay so that's a good example. Thanks for doing that.
That's too far into the blind stuff. Connect it back to what you're doing.
- - - - - - - - - - -
Investors who don't take action now are going to have their retirement
plans crushed.
John: There you go. Excellent. Good job.
- - - - - - - - - - -
Audience: A powerful lead generation tactic that hardly anyone knows
about or uses.
John: Can you imagine saying that face-to-face somebody?
Now change it. You're actually talking to me and you don't know who I am. I
don't know who you are.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 12 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 13
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
Now say it the way you would say it.
Start with “I've got…” and don't give me “powerful lead generation,” give me
another word.
You're on the right track. I'm trying to get you down to a more conversational
tone.
People confuse good selling with hype all the time. This is one of my constant
battles.
I have headlines like “The One Legged Golfer” and “How Does This Old Man
Golfer, Crippled by Arthritis Still Routinely Humiliate PGA Pros in the
Underground Golf Game?” and they think that's hype; it can't be true.
The thing is I only operate from truth. Now the words I use may jack the truth
up a bit.
But it's all true. I'm not lying. I'm not exaggerating anything. I'm merely telling
the story in a compelling way.
So just try it one more time. I'm picking on you. So try it one more time.
Seriously we're sitting in a bar. I don't know who you are and I'm ready to bolt
because I think you're trying to sell me
something. So rephrase it.
I've got a way to double your lead
generation that hardly anyone knows
about.
Okay, that's not bad. It's a good start. That might get my attention if my problem
is lead generation. So that's actually not bad.
Keep it simple. You can take that later and jack it up a bit if you want.
I like to do parenthetical comments when I write. Parenthetical comments are
the explanatory part of what you just said. I call it the one, two punch of bullets.
The words I use may
jack the truth up a
bit but it's all true.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 13 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 14
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
So if you said that then, in parenthesis, you may say how you would answer if I
raised my eyebrows and you then further it.
For example, “If you're in a marketing niche with a lot of competition and what
used to work isn't working anymore, I've got a way around that that
immediately zooms you right to the top of the field again.” Something like that.
- - - - - - - - - - -
Audience: You're a parent who has a teenager and you're thinking about
teaching them to drive. We have a product that teaches you how to do that.
What we can do is… you're a driver, you're an experienced driver; you don't
think about how to do things when you're drive. You just do it
automatically. But that's not what you do with a beginner.
What we'll do is we'll show you what to say, when to say it, how to say it,
why to say it and how to say it so it'll make it easy for you to get them to be
able to brake safely, stay smoothly and make you feel comfortable when
you're in the car with them.
John: You've been a salesman before haven't you?
Well I've talked to a few clients.
That was excellent. In fact you were showing off!
- - - - - - - - - - -
Audience: I'm talking to dentists who want more profitability in their
practice. I'm a hygienist and I guess you have the struggling practice.
Doctor, I have three easy things that your hygienists can do that will
increase your practice profitability by $100,000 this year and it won't
involve any time on your part at all.
John: Bingo. Very good.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 14 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 15
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
- - - - - - - - - - -
Audience: I have a patient drinking and he couldn't drink because he has
a toothache. So that's what I'm facing.
John: So the guy next to you has a toothache and you say, "I couldn't help
overhearing that you have a toothache." And one of the things you would say to
him was what?
I had this guy that came into my office like you and his face was swollen
and he couldn't even talk, he was just crying. I took out his teeth and he
came back the next day smiling; he didn't remember anything.
Okay, not bad. Not bad.
So that would that work for sedation dentistry?
Yes. I would amp it up a bit and we'll talk about that a little bit more but yes.
So run this through the gauntlet. You’re running this through the gauntlet of the
real world.
Ads don't work in an imaginary world where all the rules
of face-to-face talking are suddenly lifted or put on hold.
It's the same thing. You're just multiplying the number of people you're
reaching.
- - - - - - - - - - -
Audience: The client is a hair stylist, who either works with somebody else
as a booth renter or they own their own traditional big salon.
John: Okay. And their problem is not making money?
They just hate their situation. The problem is they have a headache.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 15 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 16
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
I got you. In almost every professional situation, the number one problem that
people have when they own a business – and this is what a lot of marketers
don't understand – is they're fried.
I wrote a chiropractic ad for a chiropractic coach and his big appeal was sort of
make more money but a lot of it was work less, work a couple hours a day,
things will run on autopilot.
I just made these guys start drooling and their eyes would flutter and they'd fall
back in a swoon.
How would you like to be able to own your own salon with no maintenance,
no employees and no down payment?
John: I think you're lying to me.
We have a way that you can have your own salon space and never have to
deal with other employees and you don't have to take care of maintenance.
Yeah but do I got to work for somebody?
No you own your own salon.
I own it. I cannot go in if I don't want to go in on a Thursday.
You can totally set your own hours and have complete control of your
schedule.
Good job.
- - - - - - - - - - -
Audience: I have a fitness business. I'm packaging my system together and
my line is I help personal trainers quit the gym and make six figures in less
than 12 months without spending a dollar on advertising.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 16 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 17
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
John: That’s all right but it's not conversational. That's what I'm trying to teach
you to do. A lot of you know how to write an ad and that is almost damaging to
your ability to bond with people.
You have to back away. Run it through what you would really say.
I happen to know something about this business, because I worked with body
builders and I worked with a lot of the martial artists and stuff. The way you
would talk to me is that I might say something like:
"You know what? I've been doing this for several years. I take idiots who
stumbled into owning a business and were failing and I turn them around
overnight. So within a month all their problems…
I'm going to guess what your problems are; your problems are you're
overworked, you're underpaid, you're spending too much time training yourself
and you're not making any money from it.
You're spending all your time being a trainer and the people who work for you
make all the money. You get nothing. And your wife's mad at you. I'll solve all
that overnight."
Is that close to the truth of what you do?
You nailed it, yeah.
- - - - - - - - - - -
Audience: This is more of a question. Let's say you're in financial services.
You hear somebody talking about companies going bankrupt. They’ve got
to get rid of their retirees. They don't know how to do it tactfully.
So would what you’re saying in print be something like, "We’ve developed a
way to discharge your financial obligation while keeping the retirees
whole."
John: I don't know, is that the way you talk to people face-to-face in this biz?
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 17 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 18
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
One of the things I like to do… I just talked with my first financial advisor that I
actually like.
The reason I liked him, probably much to my detriment, because he'll probably
steal everything I have and run off with it, is because we sat down and we
actually had a conversation first and I'm not in that.
I’ve given him a very small amount of money… I'm not going to let him have
everything right off the bat. He wanted it all but I'm not going to give it to him.
So I am now under his average where he wants to pay attention to you but he's
giving me the attention that he's giving guys with five times more money
because we had a conversation, I bonded with him.
I actually reversed the thing… suddenly when Joe Blow, the other client that he
has, has an appointment with him and Joe Blow's coming in what does the
average investment advisor think?
It's like, "I got to talk to that asshole again," right? Am I wrong?
I'm not in financial services but yeah I imagine. I was asking a question.
John: Oh okay. Well let me finish it. It might be irrelevant to your situation but
it's relevant overall.
For me coming in… so I come in and what does he think when I'm coming in?
Hey, Carlton's here. This will be a fun hour. So reverse that. You want to be the
best thing that ever happened in this guy's life.
Your ad needs to be the thing that wakes him up and
makes him think, “Wow things really can change.”
So you keep running everything you say and do through that gauntlet.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 18 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 19
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
In real life, how might you get the guy to actually turn on a stool and face you
and go, "What? Are you kidding? I really can do that? You really can help me do
that?"
Something like that. Okay finish your question.
The second part was, is what you're trying to say teasing? We can do this.
It'll be great. Blah, blah, blah. Interested, then say, "You know what? This
isn't the right atmosphere. I can't explain it to you all in this one little ad."
That's kind of where I was going with that.
If that is your marketing method to get them to then call you or do something
later, that would be equivalent of handing the guy a business card and saying,
"Call me when you get a chance."
But you better be confident you left him with enough tease that you're going to
leave and he's going to think and he's going take out his cell phone and call you
before you reach your car.
Some of my best customers over the years started out hating my guts because
they woke up in the middle of the night after not buying what I had and they
couldn't get back to sleep without picking up the phone and ordering. That's the
point you want to get to.
- - - - - - - - - - -
Audience: The simple, bio-mechanical details to double your rate of
getting leg locks on bigger and stronger opponents.
John: Yeah, that's a classic one. Now tell me, we're in a bar and I've actually
kind of given you the half shoulder turn. I'm kind of listening; then what would
you actually say? That was a kind of a professionally written bullet.
Okay, so I'd be like, "Yeah it's not all that difficult once you understand the
kinesiology behind how feet and knees work to be able to tweak the stuff a
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 19 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 20
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
little bit more effectively to get more out of yourself, even if you're not a
big guy or a strong guy, and be able to break stuff.
Okay, that's not bad but what you did is you started back walking. You started
spinning and walking back. What could be a much more powerful way that you
would keep my attention would be, “Most people screw up leg locks as you
probably know, and I teach guys with your size, for example…” [You’re talking to
specific guy] “With your size you should be able to take down a guy 250, 300
pounds easily even if he's trained in another martial art” – something like that.
That's how you would start talking to them.
- - - - - - - - - - -
This is a short bullet point; it's actually for a friend of mine who's in the
karate business. He owns a couple of karate schools. He's sitting back here
and we were brainstorming a little bit.
It only takes five words from a bully to crush your child's self-esteem.
John: Okay. What are those five words?
Well I don't know that! It's a blind bullet.
This is a good little sub lesson for everybody. If you're going to do that, you
better have a good answer for that because, in real life, what's going to happen
when you do this kind of teasing? You better have a response.
Either “here are the five” or “here's three of them and the other two are too
powerful. I can't say it here because I might offend somebody.” Something that
brings it forward.
So give them half the information, keep the other two. Five's a good number. Not
bad at all.
- - - - - - - - - - -
www.getwsodownload.com

Audience: I'm speaking with a female client who's worried about her face.
Either she's thinking about Botox or this $108 million industry for
cosmeceuticals and what I tell her is, "I can take 10 years off your face in
less than 10 days guaranteed."
John: Really? Women don't want rat poison injected into their pores?
And I don't do that. I have a system based on your skin type and it's called
the Exclusive European Rejuvenated.
Okay, you've lost me right there. Probably lost
her too.
No, women will listen to this.
You're absolutely on the right track. Find out where it hurts and go for it. That
was good. That was a good example.
In fact, as you listen to this, could you see that happening in real life in a bar?
And a guy talking to a woman in a bar, that's an extra; if your market is heavily
gender split, then you’ve got to be thinking about that.
Most of the copywriters I deal with are men. I take special effort with the
women because I believe that more women should be involved as professional
copywriters because the world just needs it. There's so many markets that are
dominated by women.
For the guys, they think they're going to go out there and do their stuff that
works selling cars to get women to do this women-oriented stuff.
What I do is I have the copywriters go and read a Danielle Steele novel, get every
single magazine at the store that has a woman on the cover – Cosmopolitan, Red
Book, all those scary things. And they have to go back and read them.
Find out where it
hurts and go for it.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 21 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 22
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
Every single time those guys come back to me and they can't speak. They're
stunned. They don't trust their wife anymore. They're scared to go to sleep at
night now, next to them in bed.
The Danielle Steele novel especially really gets them. But they start to
understand how to talk to them. It's different. It's a little different.
The joke among professional copywriters is that men tend to talk about the
specifics so much that you feel you could walk outside and construct the object
yourself using just the blueprint that he has given you.
Women to tend to write in such emotional things that you feel really great but
you have no idea what the product is.
- - - - - - - - - - -
Audience: We’re in fitness education in Australia. We educate you on how
to become a personal trainer.
John: Boring. It just didn't jack me up. So let's see if we can't help this out.
I'm there and I say to Joe the bartender, "Boy I've had a bad day. I've got a
personal training business in Sydney and I think I'm going to go bust in about
two months because I'm running out of ideas of how to bring people in."
You turnaround, you say, "Excuse me. I couldn't help overhearing." But talk.
No, we're a college. So people come to us to study how to become a
personal trainer. In Australia you have to actually do certificate courses. So
it's like a college. So he would've already studied.
You're off the rails. I'm having a double. I'm drinking. All my life I've wanted to
be a personal trainer. I have no idea how to do it and I think I'm going to have to
go join the Australian Peace Corp. and live in Australia for the rest of my life.
And you say, "I'm sorry I couldn't help overhearing. But…"

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 23
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
We provide Australia's leading fitness education.
Alright. Not very exciting but to the absolute specific targeted market that
you're after that may be enough to get your foot in the door and that's all you're
doing with this first step.
But you might try bonding with them a little bit, which is, "Hey I had the same
problem you had before. I solved it by getting an accreditation and guess what?
In Australia you have to be accredited and once you're accredited a lot of doors
actually open for you.
You can get jobs at gyms and stuff like that. And guess what? They're starved for
people just like you who are ready to go and you have the right attitude and all
you need is accreditation and you're off for it."
- - - - - - - - - - -
Audience: You're a private investigator complaining because you're
spending so many hours writing up reports for clients and not having any
time to do investigations.
Okay, and I'm drinking heavy. So what do you say?
I was talking to this other PI, Sam, and he told me he was spending hours
editing eight hours of surveillance video into five minutes. Then didn't
know what to do with it. So he uploaded it to You Tube and called his client
quickly and said, "Quick look on You Tube to find that video."
Then he’d pull it down and he'd spend all night worrying that it was left up
there forever and losing the confidentiality and didn't know what the heck
to do.
I figured out a way that with 10 minutes of just playing some of that
surveillance video you could capture it, embed it into a PDF document and
share it with the client and they could play it behind a secure firewall and
no one would ever see it.
www.getwsodownload.com

Audience: I’m a graphic designer and I would like to teach other graphic
designers how to actually make money doing what they do.
John: I was a graphic designer briefly, a color blind graphic designer I'll have
you know. I don't have enough time to tell the story but I actually was working
in Silicon Valley.
I was a designer and it's one of those gigs where you are highly trained and
poorly paid.
That's right. Designers and artists tend to be very purist, focusing on their
skills but never making any money.
So my headline would be, “Learn five new ways to be an awesome graphic
designer without learning any new design skills.”
Not “awesome.” My problem is making money. “How to become the highest-paid
graphic artist in Nashville without learning another graphic art skill.”
I have a lot of artist friends. I live near, not an artist colony but there's a lot of
pockets of artists – some who are recognized, some who are not – in northern
Nevada.
I become friends with these people because half of my head is in the art world
anyway. And I always briefly bring up how to make money as an artist to them.
90% of them tell me, “Oh no, no, no can't do that.” It would spoil their purity or
something. It’s better to be broke. And yet they're not broke.
www.getwsodownload.com

"I don't want to hear it. I want people to come already willing to buy and

Once you know that stuff, then you can swoop in.

Step #7: Here's How I’ve Packaged It All Up
Step seven is here's how I’ve packaged it all up.
So you've got their attention. You're kind
of working it out.
I'm going to read an ad that more or less
sums this up in a second but here's how
I’ve packaged it all up.
And that is different for all of you. It could be a service, could be an actual
physical product, could be something digital.
Step #8: Remove the Obstacles
Step eight is remove the obstacles. For example, reverse the risk. You guys know
how to do that. You're not a rookie crowd.
Have a jaw dropping price; overkill
support.
Sometimes you're in the part of the
business cycle where you need to bring

it all up.

overkill support.)

people in and you may need to take a hit on the first sale.
A lot of businesses, even entrepreneurial businesses, don't make their money on
the first sale. They make their money on the backend.
So you have to decide what you're going to do there but this would be removing
the obstacles.
Reversing the risk – when I read this thing you'll understand that.
Step #9: Here’s What You Need to Do Now
Step nine, this is key. How many people have had a great conversation with
somebody and then they left and you never heard from them again, even though
you knew they were a hot prospect?
A lot of people. That's what happens.
You know why? Do you know what the Larry King effect is? I'm dating myself
again, but you all know who Larry King was? He was this interviewer guy.
He would frequently have authors on
there or people who were actually
businessmen or entrepreneurs.
The Larry King effect would be an
entrepreneur came on and would come
off after a nice little chat with Larry King
and they'd say, "My god I was in front of three million people talking to Larry
King."
They'd sit back and wait for the sales to come in. Do you know how much money
they made off of that? Bupkis, because they didn’t tell people what they need to
do now.
Now what that involves would be what we talked about in the previous session
– lizard brain versus the pre-frontal cortex.
Step #9
Here’s what you need to
DO NOW.
(Lizard brain vs. pre-frontal
cortex.)

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 27
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
You want to use both. Remember if the guy gives you money there – or if he
decides to get involved or whatever – he's got to go back and explain it to the
wife, the know-it-all brother in-law or the neighbor who always has a newer
better car. And he has to justify it to himself because you're going to walk away.
Let's say he says, "You know I need this right now. Here's a check." Then you
walk away. You shake hands and he's all pumped up and you're out of there.
What happens three minutes later? If you haven't connected with him he's
forgotten why he bought it. Buyer's remorse.
The 9 Minute Conversation
So I will read one to you. It's a nine-minute conversation, basically:
 Here's who I am.
 Here's what I got for you.
 Here's why it's perfect for your situation.
 Here's what you need to do now.
Let's say this is going back to the guy who was sitting next to a guy who was
online. I actually wrote this several years ago. I haven't checked it so there might
be some incorrect online stuff in here. But this is just a blast out.
Superscript: Are you getting lots of hits but not converting them into
sales?
Headline: How To Quickly Double The Number Of Sales You Make
Online.
Dear Friend,
My name is Joe Black and if you'd like to discover an easy, fast way to at
least double the number of sales you're getting right now with your
website, I can show you exactly how to do it.

stratosphere of the online entrepreneurial world.
What's interesting is most of my life I was the young punk at the table, the guy
who purposely came in to rattle the nerves of the old guys because I knew how
to make sales happen and they didn't, even though they owned the businesses.
One day, about 10 years ago, I looked around and I was the oldest guy by 20
years at the table.
This was when the online world kind of exploded. So that was a sobering
thought.
Remember the Three Lessons
Remember the three lessons.
1. What are you selling? It’s not the thing. It’s the RESULT
It's not a 12 DVD package with a binder and coaching program. It's the result.
I'm selling, “How to stop being miserable and start being rich.”
2. The elevator chat.
How many of you continue to refine your elevator chat? Good.
Then this one.
3. It's all about…
Grabbing their attention amidst the
chaos.
A little bit of shock value helps,
certainly being relevant and being
unique.
You lure them into your world. You
are the conduit between the world
they're in – of pain, misery, bad sales, not a good future…
It’s All About
Grabbing their ATTENTION amidst the chaos…
Luring them into YOUR WORLD…
And helping them realize that THIS is what they
NEED and WANT…
And YOU ARE THE PERSON they want to deal
with.
www.getwsodownload.com

-- 30 of 32 --

HOW TO CREATE IRRESISTIBLE SALES MESSAGES FOR ANY BUSINESS PAGE 31
© 2014 GKIC Module 5
You are the conduit. You will take them over the hill.
You've gone there. You've gone to Nirvana on the other side of the hill. Now
you've come back.
You know the path.
You will take them by hand and lead them.
You must help them realize this is what they need and what they want and you
are the person they want to deal with or you are the business they want to deal
with.
Making It Happen
Can you do this? Can you make it happen?
A lot of you are going to go back next week and you're going to think, “Yeah, of
course, I can do it.” And you're going to sit there and go, "But I don't remember
how to do it."
Somebody came by and said they thought, “Yeah maybe I can learn something
from this idiot.” I thought that was the best compliment I've heard.
I am an idiot. I don't know anything more than you do. I'm not smarter than you.
I have more experience. I spent 30 years in the front line trenches. But what did
I do during those 30 years?
Two things I did.
One, I made every freaking mistake there is to make. I walked down every dark
alley there is. I fell into every pitfall.
I'm like the golfer out there just dirty, muddy with sticks in my hair and stuff
next to the guy who's all clean cut. I haven't been anywhere near the fairway.
That was my life in advertising.
But what did I do that made that worthwhile?
www.getwsodownload.com

I took notes and I learned my lessons; it was real world stuff.
And I found out I actually like teaching.
Am I a jerk? Absolutely not. I'm one of the sweetest guys you'll ever meet. I come
across a little rough and I do make people cry during consultations. But I do it
why? For their own good.
Thanks so much for listening to me and I hope you got something out of it.
